name: Everforth Inc
business: ASGN Incorporated provides information technology (IT) solutions to the commercial and government sectors. The company operates through two segments: Commercial and Federal Government. It offers services across six solution areas: Cloud and Infrastructure, Data and AI, Software Development and Engineering, Customer Experience, Cybersecurity, and Enterprise Platforms.
sellsTo: defense, intelligence, and national security customers

exposures.sentence: Everforth is a leading technology and digital engineering company with six core solution areas: (i) Cloud and Infrastructure, (ii) Data and AI, (iii) Software Development and Engineering, (iv) Customer Experience, (v) Cybersecurity, and (vi) Enterprise Platforms.
Our business heritage is in providing our clients with experienced IT and creative digital marketing billable professionals for temporary assignments and project engagements.
Our team of skilled experts tackles highly complex challenges for customers in defense, intelligence, and national security.

We develop and utilize artificial intelligence, including generative artificial intelligence, machine learning, and similar tools and technologies that collect, aggregate, analyze, or generate data or other materials or content (collectively, AI ) in connection with our business and our services.

catalysts.sentence: The transition from ASGN to Everforth is slated for the first half of 2026.
including the acquisition of Quinnox Inc., which we announced on January 20, 2026, subject to regulatory approval.

tamClaims.claim: Total addressable market of $680 billion, consisting of $490 billion commercial IT consulting, $135 billion government IT consulting, and $55 billion professional staffing.
tamClaims.sentence: Our total addressable market is approximately $680 billion, which includes $490 billion in commercial IT consulting, $135 billion in government IT consulting, and $55 billion in professional staffing.
